Every manual save or AI edit creates a new version server-side. Use
these commands to audit history and roll back when needed.

  pura versions ls <slug>           List versions (newest first)
  pura versions show <slug> <N>     Dump version N's content
  pura versions diff <slug> A B     Unified diff between two versions
  pura versions restore <slug> N    Roll forward to version N

Usage:
  pura versions [command]

Available Commands:
  diff        Unified diff between two versions (B defaults to latest)
  ls          List versions of a document
  restore     Roll forward to a previous version
  show        Print a specific version's content

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for versions

Global Flags:
      --api-url string   Override API endpoint
      --handle string    User handle (accepts alice or @alice; defaults to _)
      --jq string        Filter JSON output with jq expression
      --json             Force JSON output
      --profile string   Use named profile
      --quiet            Raw data only (no envelope)
      --token string     Override stored token
  -v, --verbose          Verbose output

Use "pura versions [command] --help" for more information about a command.
